zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice de Neville於大約1358年出生在英國達勒姆拉比 卡素時，她的父親John Neville22歲，母親Maud de Percy25歲。她於1379年之前與William Deincourt 3rd Baron Deincourt結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1433年6月20日在英國林可爾史爾布藍可尼享年76歲，埋葬在英國達勒姆拉比 煙雨 凱福斯東。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice de Neville于大约1358年出生在英国達勒姆拉比 卡素时，她的父亲John Neville22岁，母亲Maud de Percy25岁。她于1379年之前与William Deincourt 3rd Baron Deincourt结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1433年6月20日在英国林可爾史爾布藍可尼享年76岁，埋葬在英国達勒姆拉比 煙雨 凱福斯東。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Neville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Neuville in Calvados or Néville in Seine-Maritime, both so called from Old French neu(f) ‘new’ (from Latin novus) + ville ‘settlement’. One family line, originally from Neuville (Calvados), became powerful during the Wars of the Roses through Richard Neville (1428–71), 16th Earl of Warwick, nicknamed "The Kingmaker".
Irish (Munster): assimilation of the Gaelic name Ó Niadh (see Nee ) and sometimes of Ó Cnaimhín (see Nevin ).

History: George Neville came to VA in or c. 1700 and settled on the headwaters of the Occoquan River, acquiring a large estate. His descendants, bearing the surnames Neville and Craig, were of considerable importance in Pittsburgh, PA, and Cincinnati, OH.

variants.name: Nevells
meanings: Irish: variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevils
meanings: English: variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Novel
meanings: English: variant of   Neville  .
Catalan: variant of   Novell  .

variants.name: Newell
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .
English: variant of   Noel  .
English: variant of   Newhall  .

variants.name: Nevills
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Nevil
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Newill
meanings: English and Irish (or Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevill
meanings: English and Irish: of Norman origin, a variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevels
meanings: English and Scottish (Wigtownshire): of Norman origin, a variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.
Dutch and North German: unexplained.

variants.name: Nee
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, John Patrick.

Irish (Galway): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Niadh ‘descendant of Nia’ or Mac Niadh ‘son of Nia’. Compare McNee . Needham 2 and Neville have also been adopted as Anglicized forms of this name.
North German: possibly a relationship name from Middle Low German neve ‘nephew, grand-child’.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

variants.name: Alys
meanings: Variant spelling of   Alice .

variants.name: Alis
meanings: equivalent of Alice .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice de Neville was born about 1358, in Raby Castle, Durham, England, her father, John Neville, was 22 and her mother, Maud de Percy, was 25. She married William Deincourt 3rd Baron Deincourt before 1379. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died on 20 June 1433, in Blankney, Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 76, and was buried in Raby with Keverstone, Durham, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice de Neville est née environ 1358, à Raby Castle, Durham, Angleterre, son père, John Neville, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Maud de Percy, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé William Deincourt 3rd Baron Deincourt avant 1379. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée le 20 juin 1433, à Blankney, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 76 ans, et a été enterrée à Raby with Keverstone, Durham, Angleterre.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de Neville è nata il circa 1358 nel Raby Castle, Durham, England, sua padre, John Neville, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Maud de Percy, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato William Deincourt 3rd Baron Deincourt prima del 1379. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 20 giugno 1433, nel Blankney, Lincolnshire, England, all'età di 76 anni, e fu sepolta a Raby with Keverstone, Durham, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice de Nevilleが約1358年にイギリスダルハムラビー カストルで生まれた時，父John Nevilleは22歳，母Maud de Percyは25歳であった。1379年以前にWilliam Deincourt 3rd Baron Deincourtと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1433年6月20日にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアブランクニーで76歳で死去し，イギリスダルハムラビー ウィス ケバーストーンにて埋葬された。

ko.Newcastle Upon Tyne, Northumberland, Eng: 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 뉴카스틀 업 타이니
ko.lifeSummary: Alice de Neville(이)가 대략 1358년 영국 뒤람 라비 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Neville(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maud de Percy(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1379년 이전 William Deincourt 3rd Baron Deincourt(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1433년 6월 20일 영국 링코실르 블랭니에서 76세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 뒤람 라비 위스 케버스톤에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de Neville nasceu aproximadamente 1358, em Raby Castle, Durham, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Neville, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Maud de Percy, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com William Deincourt 3rd Baron Deincourt antes 1379. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 20 de junho de 1433, em Blankney, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, com 76 anos, e foi sepultada em Raby with Keverstone, Durham, Inglaterra.

ru.Newcastle Upon Tyne, Northumberland, Eng: нюкастл упон тин, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice de Neville родилась около 1358 г. в местности раби кастл, дурам, Англия, её отцу по имени John Neville было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Maud de Percy, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Deincourt 3rd Baron Deincourt перед 1379 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла 20 июня 1433 г. в местности бланни, линколншир, Англия в возрасте 76 лет и была похоронена в местности раби вит кивирстоун, дурам, Англия.
